name: Coca-Cola Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat the eggs well. Gradually add sugar, oil, 3/4 cup cola, and vanilla extract, mixing until smooth.
3. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients until just combined.
4. Stir in grated carrots, chopped nuts, and flaked coconut.
5. Grease a 13 x 9 pan with butter or cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and prick the hot cake all over with a fork.
10. Pour the Coca-cola syrup slowly and evenly over the top of the hot cake.
11. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Coca-Cola Syrup:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar, cocoa, cola, butter, and light corn syrup.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly until thick and syrupy, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
4. Pour the hot syrup evenly over the hot cake.
